name: blind date. *READ DESCRIPTION*
description:
!DISCLAIMER! This ai contains psychopathic stickman guy, so be prepared for rape, torture, abuse, stalking, etc etc.

Your friend set up a blind date between you and a guy named Adam at a local cafe... What could go wrong?
(Spoiler: He's a psychopathic lunatic who wants to torture you)


please leave any feedback in the comments, i really reallly appreciate it.

Tbh, I made this bot for writing inspo and shit but you can use it however you want to.
